title: Toyota Camry Spark Plug Type, Gap & Torque | OEM Specs
description: Factory spark plug specifications for the Toyota Camry. Type, gap, and torque specs per engine from the OEM service manual.
quickAnswer: 2AR-FE (2.5L): DENSO SK16HR11, gap 1.0-1.1 mm (0.039-0.043 in), max gap 1.3 mm (0.051 in). 2GR-FE (3.5L V6): Refer to factory SERVICE DATA page for specific type.

generations.name: 2AR-FE 2.5L 4-Cyl
notes: Coil-on-plug design. Use iridium-tipped plugs only.

specs.Note: Refer to factory SERVICE DATA page for specific plug type and gap.

faq.q: What spark plugs does a Toyota Camry use?
faq.a: The 2.5L 4-cylinder (2AR-FE) uses DENSO SK16HR11 with a gap of 1.0-1.1 mm. The 3.5L V6 (2GR-FE) uses a different plug — check the factory SERVICE DATA page for your specific year.

title: Toyota Camry Serpentine Belt Routing & Replacement
description: Factory serpentine belt routing and tensioning for the Toyota Camry. Drive belt system specs per engine.
quickAnswer: Auto-tensioner on 2AR-FE and 2GR-FE. Belt routing and tensioning procedure is in the factory ON-VEHICLE INSPECTION and INSTALLATION sections.

generations.name: 2AR-FE & 2GR-FE

specs.Belt Routing: See factory ON-VEHICLE INSPECTION and INSTALLATION diagrams for your engine.

notes: Replace if cracks exceed 1/4 of rib depth or if chunks missing.

faq.q: Does the Toyota Camry have a serpentine belt tensioner?
faq.a: Yes. Both the 2.5L 4-cylinder and 3.5L V6 use an automatic belt tensioner. No manual adjustment is needed.

title: Toyota Corolla Spark Plug Type, Gap & Torque | OEM Specs
description: Factory spark plug specifications for the Toyota Corolla. Type, gap, and torque specs per engine from the OEM service manual.
quickAnswer: 2AZ-FE (1.8L): DENSO SK20R11 or NGK IFR6A11, gap 1.0-1.1 mm (0.0394-0.0433 in). 2ZR-FE (1.8L): Refer to factory ON-VEHICLE INSPECTION page.

generations.name: 2AZ-FE 1.8L
notes: Iridium-tipped plugs. Either DENSO or NGK is acceptable.

specs.Note: Refer to factory ON-VEHICLE INSPECTION page for specific plug type.

faq.q: What spark plugs does a Toyota Corolla use?
faq.a: The 2AZ-FE engine uses DENSO SK20R11 or NGK IFR6A11 with a gap of 1.0-1.1 mm. Both are iridium-tipped and interchangeable.

title: Toyota Corolla Serpentine Belt Routing & Replacement
description: Factory serpentine belt routing and tensioning for the Toyota Corolla. Drive belt system specs per engine.
quickAnswer: Auto-tensioner on 2AZ-FE and 2ZR-FE. Belt routing and tensioning procedure is in the factory ON-VEHICLE INSPECTION and INSTALLATION sections.

generations.name: 2AZ-FE & 2ZR-FE

specs.Belt Routing: See factory ON-VEHICLE INSPECTION and INSTALLATION diagrams for your engine.

notes: Replace if cracks exceed 1/4 of rib depth or if chunks missing.

faq.q: How do you replace the serpentine belt on a Toyota Corolla?
faq.a: Use the auto-tensioner to release belt tension. Routing diagram is in the factory ON-VEHICLE INSPECTION section for your specific engine (2AZ-FE or 2ZR-FE).
